/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/c2plus_boot_probe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/DiskImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/DiskIICard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/Disassembler6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/c2plus_boot_probe.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o c2plus_boot_probe  -ldl -lm
